title: Disable --sig-proxy tests due to race conditions
body: @baude chased this for a day. It seems prohibitively difficult to test for a feature that I can't see many people actually using. Disable the failing test.

comments.body: LGTM, but it would be good to have a good hand on the race condition.

:pushpin: Commit ae4418b has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan ae4418b1098840d1ea24a17809e62e1965764c11 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
